title: Reviewer/advocate feedback + correction intake workflow
context: Backlog/future: a reviewer/advocate feedback and correction intake workflow where corrections trigger re-review and re-sign-off. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Build the reviewer/advocate feedback and correction intake workflow so a submitted correction triggers re-review and re-sign-off and is tracked to resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewer/advocate feedback and corrections can be submitted and tracked to resolution
A correction triggers re-review and re-sign-off (and, for patient cards, re-dual-sign-off) before the card is re-published
